fields.name: Kala Mahogany Soprano Ukulele
fields.description: A classic mahogany soprano with a warm, mellow tone. A welcoming first instrument for cozy evenings at home.

fields.name: Enya Nova Concert Ukulele
fields.description: Lightweight carbon body, stable tuning, and a modern look. Easy to take on weekend trips.

fields.name: Luna Tattoo Tenor Ukulele
fields.description: Expressive tenor ukulele with rich tone and striking artwork. Great for accompaniment and melodic playing.

fields.name: Flight Travel Soprano Ukulele
fields.description: Compact soprano with a comfortable neck and clear sound. Ideal for beginners and casual players.

fields.name: Protec Padded Ukulele Case
fields.description: Soft padded case with reinforced seams and a pocket for picks. Reliable protection for daily travel.

fields.name: Aquila Nylgut String Set
fields.description: Soft attack and stable tuning. Suitable for soprano and concert ukuleles.

fields.name: Cotton Ukulele Strap
fields.description: Lightweight cotton strap with soft hardware. Comfortable for standing practice and small gigs.

fields.name: Wooden Ukulele Stand
fields.description: Minimal wooden stand that keeps your instrument close at hand and looks great in a living room.

fields.name: Island Breeze Scented Candle
fields.description: Notes of coconut, vanilla, and citrus. Creates a calm atmosphere for slow evenings.

fields.name: Cozy Sand Linen Pillowcase
fields.description: Natural linen with a soft texture and warm sand tone. Gentle on skin and made to last.

fields.name: Ocean Glaze Ceramic Mug
fields.description: Hand-finished ceramic mug with an ocean glaze gradient. Comfortable shape, 350 ml capacity.

fields.name: Recycled Cotton Throw Blanket
fields.description: Soft throw for the sofa or balcony. Lightweight, warm, and easy to use all year round.

fields.name: Ukulele from Zero in 30 Days
fields.description: Step-by-step course with chords, rhythms, and easy songs. Perfect for self-paced learning.

fields.name: Chord Chart Poster A4
fields.description: A clear chord reference poster for quick practice above your desk or music corner.

fields.name: Coconut Pick Set
fields.description: Three picks in different stiffness levels made from natural material. Soft, warm tone.

fields.name: First Five Songs Video Course
fields.description: Digital access to a video course covering rhythm, fingerpicking, and five beginner-friendly songs.
